channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 JustVugg/colibri (14375 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: JustVugg

📝 Repository: JustVugg/colibri

📄 Descrizione: Run GLM-5.2 (744B MoE) on a 25GB-RAM consumer machine — pure C, zero deps, experts streamed from disk. Tiny engine, immense model. 🐦

⭐ Stelle: 14375

🍴 Forks: 1220

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-01T12:27:49Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-16T04:51:25Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Rompass/openc6-bios (286 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Rompass

📝 Repository: Rompass/openc6-bios

📄 Descrizione: An open-source RISC-V firmware platform for ESP32-C6(8MB Flash). Implements a BIOS/Payload architecture with a custom system call interface (ABI), independent LP-Core coprocessor management, and an anti-brick A/B OTA system.

⭐ Stelle: 286

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: bios bootloader embedded esp-idf esp32-c6 firmware riscv

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-15T14:02:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-13T04:24:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📄 Descrizione: AI AV Evasion Skill v4.1 是一套完整的 Shellcode 免杀方案，采用模块践踏（Module Stomping）、IPv4 混淆、XOR 加密、HeapAlloc 缓冲以及纤程（Fiber）执行等技术，从静态和行为两个层面绕过主流杀软和 EDR

🍴 Forks: 18

item.title: 📝 nmht3t/RawHive (87 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nmht3t

📝 Repository: nmht3t/RawHive

📄 Descrizione: Cobalt Strike BOF that extracts selected Windows registry hives directly from a raw NTFS volume by parsing NTFS metadata and reading file data straight from disk.

⭐ Stelle: 87

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: C

📝 Repository: The412Banner/Bannerlator

item.title: 📝 ngai-jeremy/WeatherPaper (81 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ngai-jeremy

📝 Repository: ngai-jeremy/WeatherPaper

📄 Descrizione: WeatherPaper is a health and comfort-focused smart weather station designed around a 4.2-inch e-paper display and a custom PCB. Lasting over one year and a half on a single charge. Featured on XDA Developers!
